name: Fave Alle Sette Insalate (Fava Beans & Seven
recipeInstructions:
1. This specialty is from Bari. Arrange the fava beans in the center of the plate and surround them with the colorful collection of vegetables.
2. Begin eating by starting with the fava beans.
3. Try one of the other vegetables.
4. Drink some wine.
5. Return to the beans and try another salad, etc.
6. This salad is always accompanied by wine and eaten in this rhythm.
